ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population_served" INTEGER /* Estimated population served */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution profile */,
  "hemisphere" TEXT /* Hemisphere in which the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or sub-region of the country */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the country */,
  "healthcare_system" TEXT /* Type of healthcare system in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource */,
  "resource_utilization_rate" REAL /* Utilization rate of the resource */,
  "hospital_beds" INTEGER /* Number of hospital beds available */,
  "ICU_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population */,
  "population_estimate_date" TEXT /* Date of the population estimate */,
  "population_estimate_source" TEXT /* Source of the population estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_data" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "hospital_bed_count" INTEGER /* Count of hospital beds */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital */,
  "hospital_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ICU_data" (
  "ICU_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICU data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "ICU_bed_count" INTEGER /* Count of ICU beds */,
  "ICU_type" TEXT /* Type of ICU */,
  "ICU_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the ICU */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ICU_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ICU_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ICU_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering an alert */,
  "alert_recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user interface */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the translation */,
  "translated_name" TEXT /* Translated name of the country or resource type */,
  "translation_date" TEXT /* Date of the translation */,
  "translation_source" TEXT /* Source of the translation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
